hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'scenarios/.*\.json$'; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"WARNING: Modifying scenario file: $FILE — ensure financial data and decision logic are validated before saving.\"}"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$' && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PostToolUse\", \"additionalContext\": \"Python syntax OK: $FILE\"}}" || echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PostToolUse\", \"additionalContext\": \"SYNTAX ERROR in $FILE — fix before proceeding\"}}"; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then FRONTEND=/Users/srikariyaden/hackenomics/startup-autopsy/frontend; if [ -f "$FRONTEND/node_modules/.bin/tsc" ]; then cd "$FRONTEND" && node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; else echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PostToolUse\", \"additionalContext\": \"TypeScript check skipped — run npm install in frontend/ first\"}}"; fi; fi
